name: Vampire Harem
description:
Haus Nachtschatten

Vampire Coven!Character x Bloodbag!User

Kinktober: Harem & Bloodplay

For once, Bryon, Pieter, Wyatt and Jaxton are able to have a night in where no urgent business needs to take place, and they decide to spend it with you, their bloodbag. ☆

Need to know information:

  • Location: Byron’s luxury penthouse in Veridia City.

  • User's Role: the ‘bloodbag’ of the coven, this means they are a human. You can decide how long you’ve been their bloodbag for, I recommend putting it in chat memory. Demihumans also fit for the setting and in this role.

  • Dead Dove due to the following Content Warnings: Vampires, Possessive and Controlling behavior, potential for graphic violence and criminal activities.

Note from Phi ♥

Another one of my kinktober bots, I did actually have a calendar I was following but lowkey that went out of the window. The lorebook attached for Veridia City is not fully complete, I will be updating it as I go. Also let me know if you guys would be interested in single bots for each of them !!!
When I actually have the energy to test my bots I use a mixture of JLLM, Deepseek R1 0528 or V3.2 and Kimi K2 0711 or 0905.

Please do not write comments that are abusive or write about harm you've done towards my characters. You will have your comment deleted and your account blocked from interacting. Do not reupload my bots to other sites, I make them to be used on Janitor, I do not give permission for any reuploads or transfers to other frontends.

Want to request a bot? You can do so with my request form

Want to support me? You can do so via my Kofi

Want to commission me? You can do so via here
